title: Ultimate Moves
description: I took ultimate moves from the roblox game The Strongest Battlegrounds and tried to implement them into Minecraft
body:
## What is this plugin?

This plugin is based on characters from The Strongest Battlegrounds on Roblox which is based on the anime One Punch Man, and I tried to remake the ultimate moves from the Roblox game into Minecraft.

There are currently only four abilities.

-Water Stream (/weaterstream or /ws)

-Final Hunt   (/finalhunt or /fh)

-Fire dropkick (/firedropkick or /fdk)

-FlameBurst (/flameburst or /fb)

**Only OPerators can use these abilities because they are really op and often one shot entities or people**

**You can test the plugin for fun, have it in a server or use it on your friends when they're not expecting it.**


**Currently in Beta, Soon will be used in better ways. (Best used on Paper 1.21.10+)**

**Videos Of The Plugin:**
